codeReview.summary: The fix properly adds a stop mechanism to the keyword matcher cache to prevent goroutine leaks during tests. The implementation includes a `Stop()` method using both context cancellation and a stop channel for redundancy, and two new tests verify the stop mechanism works correctly and prevents goroutine leaks.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation correctly follows CLAUDE.md goroutine patterns: uses `defer error_handling.RecoverFromPanic()` in the cleanup goroutine (GetGlobalCache), and implements proper stop mechanism with both context and stopChan for redundancy.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: alita/utils/keyword_matcher/cache.go:137-152 - cleanup goroutine has proper panic recovery and dual signal handling (ctx.Done() and stopChan)

sharedStateObservations.observation: The Stop() method follows the mutex protection pattern described in CLAUDE.md, locking before accessing shared state (cancel and stopChan fields).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: alita/utils/keyword_matcher/cache.go:89-96 - Stop() uses c.mu.Lock() before accessing cancel and stopChan

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed the bugfix-worker skill pattern correctly: read the existing code, identified the issue (goroutine leak), implemented a fix with tests, ran race detector tests, and verified lint passes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: go test -v -race passed, make test passed, golangci-lint run passed with 0 issues

summary: This fix successfully adds a stop mechanism to the keyword matcher cache cleanup goroutine to prevent leaks during tests. The implementation uses a dual-signal approach (context cancellation + stop channel) for robustness, includes proper mutex protection in the Stop() method, and adds two comprehensive tests that verify both the stop mechanism and goroutine exit behavior. All tests pass including race detector, and the keyword_matcher package has 0 lint issues. The fix follows all CLAUDE.md patterns for goroutines, error handling, and synchronization.
